-176.92328389317*is_night + load_lag_6 - 16931.5972757266*sin(1.27318055294082*hour_sin - 8.25247768338519) - 14110.2724419146*sin(1.395577780113*hour_sin + 7.40500661021315) + 79.1223402622162*Abs(0.963027226950375*hdd_18c - 0.394204241546169) - 1086.17013611475*Abs(10.5108920601674*hour_cos + 3.01676643961737) + 863.827118701164*Abs(13.4568293215443*hour_cos + 3.83600670604008) + 148.851080574423*Abs(0.000370036154466019*load_lag_24 - 25.4775366775008) + 23.2488953393776*Abs(14.3202954863911*month_cos - 3.4563939828311) + 135.950807045229*Abs(157.252281486697*sin(0.264025240076916*hour_sin + 1.78991141740091) + 0.914908396697776*Abs(0.432183240722108*hdd_18c - 8.0813484691398) + 0.678318121856567*Abs(5.66160780209531*hour_cos - 5.84212160874927) + 0.122225665354747*Abs(0.000817851466137057*load_lag_12 - 29.2776974974054) - 156.643721554511) - 5628.86435844479
